name: Absolutely Deep Dark Chocolate Fudge Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually stir in dry ingredients until just combined.
5. Fold in chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until edges are lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack before serving.
